SELECT event_time, toStartOfQuarter(event_time) AS start_of_quarter FROM dates WHERE event_time < toDateTime('2023-10-01 00:00:00');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toStartOfQuarter(event_time) AS quarter_start FROM dates GROUP BY quarter_start);
WITH (SELECT event_time FROM dates WHERE event_time > toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) AS subquery SELECT toStartOfQuarter(event_time) FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE events (id Int32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toStartOfQuarter(event_time) FROM events WHERE toStartOfQuarter(event_time) = toDate('2023-10-01');
SELECT event_time, toStartOfQuarter(event_time) AS start_of_quarter FROM events WHERE toStartOfQuarter(event_time) BETWEEN toDate('2023-04-01') AND toDate('2023-07-01');
WITH (SELECT toStartOfQuarter(toDateTime('2023-11-19 15:00:00'))) AS quarter_start SELECT quarter_start;
SELECT DISTINCT toStartOfQuarter(event_time) AS unique_quarters FROM events;
